hero.title: NEFUEN TRADING
hero.subtitle: HAZELNUTS FROM NORTH PATAGONIA
services.label: WHAT WE DO
services.title: FROM GENETICS TO MARKET
services.body: We develop European hazelnuts from the Southern Hemisphere, integrating genetic innovation and high-precision processes for the world's most demanding markets.
transition.label: NEFUEN TRADING
transition.title:
Sustainable
Processes
transition.body: We implement precision agriculture and use 100% clean energy to minimize our carbon footprint, protecting the native ecosystem.
gallery.title: OUR SERVICES
gallery.01.heading:
Harvest
& Selection
gallery.01.body: We harvest hazelnuts at their optimal ripeness in the valleys of northern Patagonia.
gallery.02.heading:
Drying
& Cleaning
gallery.02.body: Controlled drying to reach ideal moisture, followed by deep cleaning.
gallery.03.heading:
Shelling
& Grading
gallery.03.body: Grading by size and weight ensuring uniformity for export standards.
gallery.04.heading:
Certified
Export
gallery.04.body: BRC Food and Global G.A.P. packaging, ready for European, Asian and North American markets.
final.title: Global Reach
final.body: From the fertile valleys of southern Chile to the most demanding palates and markets in Europe, Asia and North America.
